<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.430194|N|136.667083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11451942]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Unreferenced|date=29 July 2015 (Wednesday) 09:42 (UTC)}} [[File:Soukei otsuka kofun.jpg|thumb|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun]] {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|48.7|N|136|40|1.5|E|region:JP-21|display=title}} '''Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun''' (宗慶大塚古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. It is designated as a {{ill|Prefectural Historic Site|ja|岐阜県指定史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Gifu Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/shiseki/motosusi/soukei.html |title=Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-08-04}}</ref>
It is also referred to as Sōkei Kofun or Ōtsuka Kofun.
== Overview == * The tomb dates to the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] (late 4th century to early 5th century). The identity of the buried individual is unknown. One theory suggests it is the tomb of {{ill|Kami Ōne|ja|神大根王|1=Kami Ōne|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|qq=}}, a [[:en:Kuni no miyatsuko|Kuni no Miyatsuko]] (Mino and Motosu Provinces), the son of {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikozakari|ja|彦坐王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikozakari|qq=}} and grandson of [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]]. * The front section of the tomb has significantly collapsed and does not retain its original shape. The rear circular section has also eroded and lost height. * The surrounding area has been developed as Ōtsuka Kofun Park.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://teikoku-eng.co.jp/jisseki/1504_soukei/soukei.html|title=Motosu City Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun Park Opened April 11 |publisher=Teikoku |accessdate=2015-07-29|language=Japanese}}</ref> The remnants of the surrounding moat have been restored as walking paths.
* **Kofun Type**: {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} * **Dimensions** (current state): ** Total Length: 82 m ** Rear Circular Section Diameter: 42.3 m ** Rear Circular Section Height: 4.2 m ** Front Section Length: 31 m
== Location == * Address: Kawarada 390, Sōkei, Motosu City, Gifu Prefecture, Japan
== Transportation Access == === By Train === ; {{ill|Tarumi Railway|ja|樽見鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumi Railway|1=Tarumi Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11543718}} * Approximately 4 km from [[:en:Kitagata-Makuwa Station|Kitagata-Makuwa Station]].
=== By Bus === ; {{ill|Gifu Bus|ja|岐阜バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜乗合自動車|1=Gifu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5560101}} * Alight at "JA Masano Branch" bus stop on the Ōno-Masano-Kitagata Line, an 8-minute walk. ** Departures from [[:en:Gifu Station|JR Gifu Station]] Bus Terminal (North, Platform 8) or [[:en:Meitetsu Gifu Station|Meitetsu Gifu Station]] (West, Platform 6), bound for {{ill|Aeon Town Motosu|ja|イオンタウン本巣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aeon Town Motosu|1=AEON TOWN Motosu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54555201}} or {{ill|Ōno Bus Center|ja|大野バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Bus Center|1=Ōno Bus Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439494}}. ; {{ill|Motosu City Municipal Bus|ja|本巣市市営バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu City Municipal Bus|1=Motosu City Municipal Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11280046}} * Alight at "Masano Branch Office" bus stop on the Danjō Line, a 15-minute walk.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.430194|N|136.667083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11451942]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:28, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:39, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Unreferenced|date=29 July 2015 (Wednesday) 09:42 (UTC)}} [[File:Soukei otsuka kofun.jpg|thumb|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun]] {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|48.7|N|136|40|1.5|E|region:JP-21|display=title}} '''Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun''' (宗慶大塚古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} located in [[:en:Motosu, Gifu|Motosu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. It is designated as a {{ill|Prefectural Historic Site|ja|岐阜県指定史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Gifu Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/shiseki/motosusi/soukei.html |title=Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-08-04}}</ref>
It is also referred to as Sōkei Kofun or Ōtsuka Kofun.
== Overview == * The tomb dates to the early [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]] (late 4th century to early 5th century). The identity of the buried individual is unknown. One theory suggests it is the tomb of {{ill|Kami Ōne|ja|神大根王|1=Kami Ōne|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|qq=}}, a [[:en:Kuni no miyatsuko|Kuni no Miyatsuko]] (Mino and Motosu Provinces), the son of {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikozakari|ja|彦坐王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikozakari|qq=}} and grandson of [[:en:Emperor Kaika|Emperor Kaika]]. * The front section of the tomb has significantly collapsed and does not retain its original shape. The rear circular section has also eroded and lost height. * The surrounding area has been developed as Ōtsuka Kofun Park.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://teikoku-eng.co.jp/jisseki/1504_soukei/soukei.html|title=Motosu City Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun Park Opened April 11 |publisher=Teikoku |accessdate=2015-07-29|language=Japanese}}</ref> The remnants of the surrounding moat have been restored as walking paths.
* **Kofun Type**: {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} * **Dimensions** (current state): ** Total Length: 82 m ** Rear Circular Section Diameter: 42.3 m ** Rear Circular Section Height: 4.2 m ** Front Section Length: 31 m

== Overview == * The tomb dates to the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} (late 4th century to early 5th century). The identity of the buried individual is unknown. One theory suggests it is the tomb of {{ill|Kami Ōne|ja|神大根王|1=Kami Ōne|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|qq=}}, a {{ill|Kuni no miyatsuko|en|Kuni no miyatsuko|WD=Q2483673|lt=Kuni no Miyatsuko}} (Mino and Motosu Provinces), the son of {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikozakari|ja|彦坐王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikozakari|qq=}} and grandson of {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Emperor Kaika}}. * The front section of the tomb has significantly collapsed and does not retain its original shape. The rear circular section has also eroded and lost height. * The surrounding area has been developed as Ōtsuka Kofun Park.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://teikoku-eng.co.jp/jisseki/1504_soukei/soukei.html|title=Motosu City Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun Park Opened April 11 |publisher=Teikoku |accessdate=2015-07-29|language=Japanese}}</ref> The remnants of the surrounding moat have been restored as walking paths.
* **Kofun Type**: {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} * **Dimensions** (current state): ** Total Length: 82 m ** Rear Circular Section Diameter: 42.3 m ** Rear Circular Section Height: 4.2 m ** Front Section Length: 31 m
== Location == * Address: Kawarada 390, Sōkei, Motosu City, Gifu Prefecture, Japan
== Transportation Access == === By Train === ; {{ill|Tarumi Railway|ja|樽見鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumi Railway|1=Tarumi Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11543718}} * Approximately 4 km from {{ill|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|en|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|WD=Q6417692|lt=Kitagata-Makuwa Station}}.
=== By Bus === ; {{ill|Gifu Bus|ja|岐阜バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜乗合自動車|1=Gifu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5560101}} * Alight at "JA Masano Branch" bus stop on the Ōno-Masano-Kitagata Line, an 8-minute walk. ** Departures from {{ill|Gifu Station|en|Gifu Station|WD=Q1144885|lt=JR Gifu Station}} Bus Terminal (North, Platform 8) or {{ill|Meitetsu Gifu Station|en|Meitetsu Gifu Station|WD=Q1109902|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station}} (West, Platform 6), bound for {{ill|Aeon Town Motosu|ja|イオンタウン本巣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aeon Town Motosu|1=AEON TOWN Motosu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54555201}} or {{ill|Ōno Bus Center|ja|大野バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Bus Center|1=Ōno Bus Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439494}}. ; {{ill|Motosu City Municipal Bus|ja|本巣市市営バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu City Municipal Bus|1=Motosu City Municipal Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11280046}} * Alight at "Masano Branch Office" bus stop on the Danjō Line, a 15-minute walk.
== References == {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|en|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|version=97999335|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Unreferenced|date=29 July 2015 (Wednesday) 09:42 (UTC)}} [[File:Soukei otsuka kofun.jpg|thumb|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun]] {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|48.7|N|136|40|1.5|E|region:JP-21|display=title}} '''Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun''' (宗慶大塚古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Motosu, Gifu|en|Motosu, Gifu|WD=Q844047|lt=Motosu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is designated as a {{ill|Prefectural Historic Site|ja|岐阜県指定史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Gifu Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/shiseki/motosusi/soukei.html |title=Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-08-04}}</ref>
It is also referred to as Sōkei Kofun or Ōtsuka Kofun.
== Overview == * The tomb dates to the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period}} (late 4th century to early 5th century). The identity of the buried individual is unknown. One theory suggests it is the tomb of {{ill|Kami Ōne|ja|神大根王|1=Kami Ōne|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|qq=}}, a {{ill|Kuni no miyatsuko|en|Kuni no miyatsuko|WD=Q2483673|lt=Kuni no Miyatsuko}} (Mino and Motosu Provinces), the son of {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikozakari|ja|彦坐王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikozakari|qq=}} and grandson of {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Emperor Kaika}}. * The front section of the tomb has significantly collapsed and does not retain its original shape. The rear circular section has also eroded and lost height. * The surrounding area has been developed as Ōtsuka Kofun Park.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://teikoku-eng.co.jp/jisseki/1504_soukei/soukei.html|title=Motosu City Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun Park Opened April 11 |publisher=Teikoku |accessdate=2015-07-29|language=Japanese}}</ref> The remnants of the surrounding moat have been restored as walking paths.
* **Kofun Type**: {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpokoenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpokoenfun|qq=}} * **Dimensions** (current state): ** Total Length: 82 m ** Rear Circular Section Diameter: 42.3 m ** Rear Circular Section Height: 4.2 m ** Front Section Length: 31 m
== Location == * Address: Kawarada 390, Sōkei, Motosu City, Gifu Prefecture, Japan
== Transportation Access == === By Train === ; {{ill|Tarumi Railway|ja|樽見鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumi Railway|1=Tarumi Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11543718}} * Approximately 4 km from {{ill|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|en|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|WD=Q6417692|lt=Kitagata-Makuwa Station}}.
=== By Bus === ; {{ill|Gifu Bus|ja|岐阜バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜乗合自動車|1=Gifu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5560101}} * Alight at "JA Masano Branch" bus stop on the Ōno-Masano-Kitagata Line, an 8-minute walk. ** Departures from {{ill|Gifu Station|en|Gifu Station|WD=Q1144885|lt=JR Gifu Station}} Bus Terminal (North, Platform 8) or {{ill|Meitetsu Gifu Station|en|Meitetsu Gifu Station|WD=Q1109902|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station}} (West, Platform 6), bound for {{ill|Aeon Town Motosu|ja|イオンタウン本巣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aeon Town Motosu|1=AEON TOWN Motosu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54555201}} or {{ill|Ōno Bus Center|ja|大野バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Bus Center|1=Ōno Bus Center|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439494}}. ; {{ill|Motosu City Municipal Bus|ja|本巣市市営バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu City Municipal Bus|1=Motosu City Municipal Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11280046}} * Alight at "Masano Branch Office" bus stop on the Danjō Line, a 15-minute walk.
== References == {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|en|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|宗慶大塚古墳|version=97999335|comment=Imported full ja history}}
<!--Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] {{wikidata link|Q11451942}} [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:Designated historic sites of Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Motosu]] [[Category:Kofun of Gifu prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Zenpokoenfun]] [[Category:pages]]

=== By Bus === ; {{ill|Gifu Bus|ja|岐阜バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜乗合自動車|1=Gifu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5560101}} * Alight at "JA Masano Branch" bus stop on the Ōno-Masano-Kitagata Line, an 8-minute walk. ** Departures from {{ill|Gifu Station|en|Gifu Station|WD=Q1144885|lt=JR Gifu Station|1=Gifu Station}} Bus Terminal (North, Platform 8) or {{ill|Meitetsu Gifu Station|en|Meitetsu Gifu Station|WD=Q1109902|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}} (West, Platform 6), bound for {{ill|Aeon Town Motosu|ja|イオンタウン本巣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aeon Town Motosu|1=AEON TOWN Motosu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54555201}} or {{ill|Ōno Bus Center|ja|大野バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Bus Center|1=Q11439494|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439494}}. ; {{ill|Motosu City Municipal Bus|ja|本巣市市営バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu City Municipal Bus|1=Q11280046|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11280046}} * Alight at "Masano Branch Office" bus stop on the Danjō Line, a 15-minute walk.
== References == {{Reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|List of Kofun in Japan|en|日本の古墳一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Kofun in Japan|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宗慶大塚古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|coordinates={{Coord|35.430194|N|136.667083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}
{{Unreferenced|date=29 July 2015 (Wednesday) 09:42 (UTC)}} [[File:Soukei otsuka kofun.jpg|thumb|Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun]] {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|48.7|N|136|40|1.5|E|region:JP-21|display=title}} '''Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun''' (宗慶大塚古墳) is a {{ill|zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpōkōenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpōkōenfun|qq=}} located in {{ill|Motosu, Gifu|en|Motosu, Gifu|WD=Q844047|lt=Motosu|1=Motosu, Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. It is designated as a {{ill|Prefectural Historic Site|ja|岐阜県指定史跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Historic Site|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in Gifu Prefecture.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.pref.gifu.lg.jp/kyoiku-bunka-sports/bunka-geijutsu/bunkazai-zuroku/bunkazai-zuroku/shiseki/motosusi/soukei.html |title=Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun |publisher=Gifu Prefecture |accessdate=2012-08-04}}</ref>
It is also referred to as Sōkei Kofun or Ōtsuka Kofun.
== Overview == * The tomb dates to the early {{ill|Kofun period|en|Kofun period|WD=Q459939|lt=Kofun period|1=Kofun period}} (late 4th century to early 5th century). The identity of the buried individual is unknown. One theory suggests it is the tomb of {{ill|Kami Ōne|ja|神大根王|1=Kami Ōne|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|13=User:Immanuelle/Kami Ōne|qq=}}, a {{ill|Kuni no miyatsuko|en|Kuni no miyatsuko|WD=Q2483673|lt=Kuni no Miyatsuko|1=Kuni no miyatsuko}} (Mino and Motosu Provinces), the son of {{ill|Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikoimasu no Ōkimi|lt=Hikozakari|ja|彦坐王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hikozakari|qq=}} and grandson of {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|WD=Q333548|lt=Emperor Kaika|1=Emperor Kaika}}. * The front section of the tomb has significantly collapsed and does not retain its original shape. The rear circular section has also eroded and lost height. * The surrounding area has been developed as Ōtsuka Kofun Park.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://teikoku-eng.co.jp/jisseki/1504_soukei/soukei.html|title=Motosu City Sōkei Ōtsuka Kofun Park Opened April 11 |publisher=Teikoku |accessdate=2015-07-29|language=Japanese}}</ref> The remnants of the surrounding moat have been restored as walking paths.
* **Kofun Type**: {{ill|Zenpō-kōen-fun|en|前方後円墳|lt=Zenpōkōenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|comment=doing this because I need to differentiate it in piped links too with my new interwiki tool as not the ambiguous phrase keyhole shaped kofun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpō-kōen-fun|13=User:Immanuelle/Zenpōkōenfun|qq=}} * **Dimensions** (current state): ** Total Length: 82 m ** Rear Circular Section Diameter: 42.3 m ** Rear Circular Section Height: 4.2 m ** Front Section Length: 31 m
== Location == * Address: Kawarada 390, Sōkei, Motosu City, Gifu Prefecture, Japan
== Transportation Access == === By Train === ; {{ill|Tarumi Railway|ja|樽見鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tarumi Railway|1=Tarumi Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11543718}} * Approximately 4 km from {{ill|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|en|Kitagata-Makuwa Station|WD=Q6417692|lt=Kitagata-Makuwa Station|1=Kitagata-Makuwa Station}}.
=== By Bus === ; {{ill|Gifu Bus|ja|岐阜バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gifu Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岐阜乗合自動車|1=Gifu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5560101}} * Alight at "JA Masano Branch" bus stop on the Ōno-Masano-Kitagata Line, an 8-minute walk. ** Departures from {{ill|Gifu Station|en|Gifu Station|WD=Q1144885|lt=JR Gifu Station|1=Gifu Station}} Bus Terminal (North, Platform 8) or {{ill|Meitetsu Gifu Station|en|Meitetsu Gifu Station|WD=Q1109902|lt=Meitetsu Gifu Station|1=Meitetsu Gifu Station}} (West, Platform 6), bound for {{ill|Aeon Town Motosu|ja|イオンタウン本巣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aeon Town Motosu|1=AEON TOWN Motosu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q54555201}} or {{ill|Ōno Bus Center|ja|大野バスセンター|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōno Bus Center|1=Q11439494|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11439494}}. ; {{ill|Motosu City Municipal Bus|ja|本巣市市営バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motosu City Municipal Bus|1=Q11280046|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11280046}} * Alight at "Masano Branch Office" bus stop on the Danjō Line, a 15-minute walk.
